subcodes.first_line: We had indeed contemplated the earth and hearkened unto its tale and its tidings, when there arose from one of the chambers [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد کنا تفکرنا فی الارض و سمعنا حدیثها و اخبارها اذا طلعت من غرفه من غرفات
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @call to action, @symbolism
